name: Chicken Wrapped in Bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper.
2. Cut bacon into three pieces and wrap each piece around a chicken breast.
3. Line a large casserole dish or pan with dried beef strips (at least one strip per chicken breast).
4. Place the wrapped chicken breasts on top of the beef in the dish.
5. Add a little water to the dish.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for about 45 minutes.
7. Mix together sour cream and cream of celery soup.
8. Pour the mixture over the chicken and return to the oven for an additional 15 to 20 minutes.
9. Serve hot with rice.
